name: Tale of the Leading star
short_description: Isekai Uncle Gathers a Harem of Beauties!~
detailed_description:
Isekai Uncle Gathers a Harem of Beauties!~

In a world of sword and sorcery, I was a despised, plain-looking, good-for-nothing middle-aged man. Just when I decided to "lie flat" and give up on life, I was betrayed and used as cannon fodder...
I... I refuse to accept this!
A life of waking up whenever I want, counting money until my hands cramp, and being surrounded by tons of beautiful women...
Even an old guy like me can make that happen！

 

Game Features: Multiple Heroines + Lighthearted Fantasy Adventure

A story-driven experience with gameplay in a supporting role, its dynamic narrative framework presents a unique charm, blurring the line between a game and an anime.
The immersive story is based on the original, epic-length light novel. The game is released in an anime-style seasonal format. The first season of Ling Xing Wu Yu (领星物语) alone contains 350,000 words of pure light novel content.
Many unique and distinctive heroines will continue to appear as the exciting story unfolds...
